topic: Falsifier registry baseline auto-rotation via pre-commit hook (R3 full + R4 ledger)

decisions: Hash the STAGED blob (`git show :path`), not the working tree, so an unstaged edit cannot leak a wrong baseline.
Local-only rotation: state/ is gitignored; do NOT auto-stage the baseline (avoids cross-developer baseline conflicts).
Idempotent guard: when OLD_SHA == NEW_SHA, exit 0 silently (no log entry, no stderr noise).
Failure paths exit 0, never block the commit (raw 71 — defense reports, doesn't gate).
Sandbox cannot write to `.git/hooks/` (EPERM); chose `.githooks/` (project-tracked) + `git config core.hooksPath .githooks`.
`.githooks/pre-commit` chmod +x; `.githooks/` is now an untracked artifact ready for main-thread commit.
core.hooksPath is per-repo local config — clones must re-run `git config core.hooksPath .githooks` (document if standardized).

trials.name: rotation-fires
trials.setup: appended test marker to falsifiers.jsonl; git add
trials.result: hook fired: 584a9d9f... → 6a33aed9... ; baseline rewritten; log entry appended; exit 0

trials.name: idempotent-no-op
trials.setup: re-ran hook with same staged state
trials.result: exit 0; log line count remained 1 (no duplicate entry); no stderr

trials.name: cleanup-unwind
trials.setup: git restore --staged + restore baseline + restore registry + rm log
trials.result: working-tree sha = baseline sha = 584a9d9fb1761fea... ; status clean of test artifacts

decisions: README.md gains §'Defense system' subsection between Audit Reports and Candidate Reviews.
Subsection enumerates R1/R2/R3-lite/R3-full/R4 layers with mechanism + live-since + artifact path.
Threat model paragraph maps each defense to a concrete attack/oversight scenario.

tier_1_outcomes: Hook installed at .githooks/pre-commit, executable, core.hooksPath=.githooks live.
Rotation triggered Y in test (584a9d9f → 6a33aed9 → reverted); idempotent on re-run.
Forensic ledger format validated (single JSONL line, ts/old_sha/new_sha/trigger keys).
README.md Defense system section added (R1-R4 table + threat model).

fixpoint_marker.evidence: Hook + idempotency + cleanup all PASS in single iteration; no follow-up axes opened; defense ladder is now end-to-end (per-entry hash → baseline → auto-rotation → ledger).
next_axes_dormant: Cross-developer baseline sync (currently local-only by design; revisit only if state/ becomes tracked).
core.hooksPath enforcement (currently manual per-clone; could move to bootstrap script if standardized).
